Title: Kiddus Fashionable Girls Watch for Kids. Children’s Analogue Wristwatch with Educational Exercises. Japanese Quartz Movement. Cute, Stylish, Elegant & Fabulous Descripion: ["STYLISH & EDUCATIONAL WATCH FOR KIDS: Designed for children who are learning to read the time AND who want to be fabulously fashionable. Cute designs, vibrant colours and glitter all over make them super attractive. Your child will love his fancy watch! RECOMMENDED AGE: For Children from 5 years old. Not suitable for children under 3 years of age due to small parts which may cause a chocking hazard. RELIABLE & ADJUSTABLE: Provided with a HIGH-QUALITY Japanese Mechanism and LONG LASTING Japanese battery, our kids watch line features also a SHOCK RESISTANT CASE, nickel-free stainless steel backside, and 8 adjustment holes on the strap to fit wrists large and small. Our watches for kids are water resistant, so they can withstand splashes while washing hands or playing in the rain but should be removed before bathing or swimming. PERFECT GIFT - GIVE THE GIFT OF TIME: Available in a variety of styles and colours, our childrens' watches come packaged in a GIFT BOX so you can watch your child’s face light up as the box is opened. Also included is a worksheet with specific Time Teacher exercises to learn to read the time with your child. PURCHASE WITHOUT WORRY: As our products are rigorously tested and made with love, we firmly believe in the high quality of our product. So we offer a 30 day unconditional MONEY BACK GUARANTEE and a 12-month warranty. Even if you give it to someone else, it's still covered! If you have problems or issues with the watch, contact us and we will help you."]

Good elasticity makes it possible to completely cover the calf and not be too tight, protecting your circulation. Stay Up Well - After multiple tests and experiments, the leg warmer will stay up all day, feel free to walk or move as you like, not having to keep tugging at them to keep them up.']
